hypothesis: If DFT-optimized Lennard-Jones parameters and polymer-specific pretrained molecular representations are combined with Bayesian optimization (GP/DKL/BNN surrogates and Thompson sampling), then the framework will discover polyamine structures with higher CO2 adsorption capacity using significantly fewer GCMC simulations than approaches using geometric-mean mixing rules and general molecular representations because the refined force field parameters and tailored representations produce more accurate adsorption predictions and more efficient surrogate modeling.
